ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest (e.g., hotel, hotels, boutique hotel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interest */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the interest (e.g., accommodation, activity, destination) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interest data (e.g., social media, online reviews) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience */,
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest the audience is associated with */,
  "audience_size" REAL /* Size of the audience (e.g., 6.1M) */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographics of the audience (e.g., F:36% M:64%) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the audience */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the audience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audience data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audiences_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_id") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender distribution */,
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audience the gender distribution is associated with */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender (e.g., F, M) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the gender in the audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender distribution was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gender distribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genders_audience_id FOREIGN KEY ("audience_id") REFERENCES audiences ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution */,
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audience the age distribution is associated with */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 25-34) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the age range in the audience */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age distribution was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the age distribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ages_audience_id FOREIGN KEY ("audience_id") REFERENCES audiences ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank */,
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest being ranked */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the interest */,
  "audience_size" REAL /* Audience size of the interest */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Score representing the engagement level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rank was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_id") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotels" (
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hotel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hotel */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotel */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the hotel */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the hotel */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided by the hotel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hotel data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hotel data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_hotel" (
  "interest_hotel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interest */,
  "hotel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hotel */,
  "association_strength" REAL /* Strength of the association between interest and hotel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_hotel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_hotel_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_id") REFERENCES interests ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_hotel_hotel_id FOREIGN KEY ("hotel_id") REFERENCES hotels ("hotel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
